summary: Single short-side pricechange entry combining smart-money positioning and funding extremes — research-integrity is clean; minor advisory caution on multi-test inflation given the 523-archetype registry.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields (top_trader_position_ratio_low, funding_pct_top_decile, move_pct>=3) are point-in-time observables at T0 — no forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* tokens. top_trader_position_ratio is a Binance-published snapshot and funding is a contemporaneous rate; both are queryable at signal time without future-snooping.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: User's live system runs OI_Price pump-long; this proposal is pricechange-channel short, so no same-symbol same-side collision. Theoretical opposite-side overlap if a symbol triggers both pump-long live and this fade-short in paper, but paper-shadow only — monitoring item, not a blocker.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required. For monitoring: track concurrent-position count if this rule co-fires with other pricechange/short archetypes on the same symbol within a 5m window, and log any cases where the symbol simultaneously satisfies the live OI_Price pump-long entry to study cross-strategy interaction.
